name: SCC_CM_Set_Key_Cnf
title: SCC_CM_Set_Key_Cnf
syntax: void SCC_CM_Set_Key_Cnf ( byte RunId[], byte SourceMacAddress[], dword Result )
description: The callback is called as soon as a CM_Set_Key.Cnf message is received. Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with SCC_SLAC_GetCMSetKeyCnfData.

parameters.name: RunId
parameters.description: Random Run Identifier of sender (8 byte)
